narrative:
Bridgewater Twp township has 1,030 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
